channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia and Ukraine Trade Ceasefire Accusations as Moscow Prepares Victory Day Parade
item.description: Both nations accused each other of violating ceasefires ahead of Russia's WWII commemoration under tight security, while fighting continues despite temporary truces.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🛡️ Ukraine Running Short on Air Defence Missiles After Winter Campaign
item.description: Ukraine's air force warned it is running low on air defence missiles following Russia's massive winter attacks, as it braces for further strikes.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Exports Surge as Companies Stockpile Amid Iran War Fears
item.description: Chinese export growth quickened in April as firms rushed to stockpile components, worried the Iran conflict could push input costs higher.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🎖️ Victory Day Reveals Putins War Dilemma
item.description: Russia's low-key WWII commemorations highlight tensions as Moscow prepares its annual parade under heightened security amid the ongoing Ukraine conflict.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷⚔️ US and Iran clash in Strait of Hormuz as Tehran mulls ceasefire proposal
item.description: US forces carried out retaliatory strikes on Iranian targets after Tehran attacked destroyers in the Strait of Hormuz. Washington awaits Irans response to a ceasefire proposal as Trump insists the truce still holds.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇦🇪🛡️💥 NPR: UAE intercepts missiles as US-Iran fighting flares
item.description: The UAE engaged air defenses against Iranian missiles and drones as the US-Iran ceasefire frayed. Washington expects Irans response to its peace proposal later on Friday.
item.dc:creator: NPR

item.title: 🇺🇸🇺🇦⏸️ Rubio admits US peace mediation in Ukraine has stalled
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio acknowledged that US efforts to broker peace in Ukraine have not led to a fruitful outcome so far, marking a frank admission of the diplomatic deadlock.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🛢️ Russian air defenses struggle to protect oil refineries from Ukrainian drone campaign
item.description: Analysis explains why Ukraine keeps striking the Tuapse oil terminal on Russia Black Sea coast despite Russias massive air defense network. Infrastructure dispersion and fuel flammability create structural vulnerabilities that even Pantsir systems cannot fully address.
item.dc:creator: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇪🇺 European NATO members step up as US role in alliance recedes amid Iran war tensions
item.description: Trump decision to strike Iran without NATO consultation has inflamed tensions with European allies. US announces 5,000 troop withdrawal from Germany, while Spain refused access to joint bases and Britain distanced itself from US Iran policy.
item.dc:creator: NPR

item.title: 🇮🇹🇺🇸 Meloni Meets Rubio as Iran War Strains Italy-US Ties
item.description: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni held talks with U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio amid unusual strain between Rome and the Trump administration over the Iran conflict, highlighting diverging European and American approaches to the crisis.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇩🇪🇺🇸 Trump Announces Withdrawal of 5,000 US Troops from Germany
item.description: President Donald Trump announced he will withdraw 5,000 U.S. troops from Germany as a rift over the Iran war widens between Washington and NATO allies, raising questions about the legal and practical implications of such a move.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸💻 US Suspects Nvidia Chips Smuggled to China via Thailand
item.description: A firm linked to Thailand's national AI initiative is suspected of helping smuggle billions of dollars worth of servers containing advanced Nvidia chips to China, Bloomberg reported, citing sources familiar with the matter.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 Zelenskiy Criticizes Russia's Victory Day Ceasefire Logic
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy said Russia's limited ceasefire for World War Two commemorations exposes the "strange and inappropriate" logic of its leaders, as peace efforts remain stalled.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 💵📉 Dollar Heads for Second Weekly Fall Despite US-Iran Clashes
item.description: The dollar was set for its second straight weekly decline as investors remained cautiously optimistic about a diplomatic resolution to the Iran conflict, even after renewed hostilities near the Strait of Hormuz.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🎂 David Attenborough Turns 100, "Overwhelmed" by Global Tributes
item.description: The legendary British wildlife broadcaster David Attenborough turned 100 on Friday, receiving worldwide accolades for his decades of work bringing nature documentaries to millions. Attenborough said he was "completely overwhelmed" by the outpouring of birthday wishes.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇸🇪 Ukraine Could Sign Gripen Fighter Deal Within Months, Sweden Says
item.description: Ukraine's purchase of Swedish Saab Gripen fighter jets could be signed within months, Sweden's defense minister said during a visit to Stockholm. The deal would bolster Ukraine's air capabilities as the war with Russia continues.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: 🇳🇬 Nigeria begins court martial of 36 officers over alleged coup plot
item.description: Nigeria's government faces mounting pressure as 36 senior military officers stand trial before a special court martial over an alleged 2025 coup plot, raising concerns about the country's worsening security situation.
item.dc:creator: France 24

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkish defense firms secure $8 billion in export deals at SAHA Expo
item.description: Turkish defense companies signed nearly $8 billion in export contracts during the first three days of SAHA Expo, a major defense trade show, highlighting Turkey's growing role as a defense exporter.
item.dc:creator: Daily Sabah

item.title: 🇧🇭 Bahrain expels three MPs after they voted against royal citizenship decree
item.description: Bahrain has revoked the parliamentary membership of three lawmakers just days after dozens had their nationalities stripped in connection with the Iran war context, amid a widening crackdown on dissent.
item.dc:creator: Middle East Eye

item.title: 🛢️ Iran seizes oil tanker Ocean Koi in Gulf of Oman
item.description: Iran's navy seized an oil tanker named Ocean Koi in the Gulf of Oman over an alleged attempt to disrupt Iran's oil exports, Iranian state media reported, adding to escalating tensions in the Strait of Hormuz.
item.dc:creator: Straits Times

item.title: 🏥 WHO documents over 3,000 attacks on Ukraine healthcare since war began
item.description: The World Health Organization has registered more than 3,000 attacks on Ukraine's healthcare system since the start of the war, marking one of the highest numbers of attacks on healthcare in any conflict.
item.dc:creator: France 24

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE intercepts drone and missile attack as Iran war ceasefire frays
item.description: The United Arab Emirates said it intercepted missiles and drones as tensions escalate despite ongoing ceasefire negotiations between Iran and the US. The UAE Ministry of Defense said its air defenses were "actively engaging" incoming threats.
item.dc:creator: AP News

item.title: ⚖️ US trade court rules Trump 10% global tariff illegal
item.description: A panel of federal judges on the Court of International Trade blocked President Trump's 10% tariffs on most US imports, ruling in a 2-1 decision that the law sidestepped a Supreme Court ruling that struck down blanket tariffs imposed under emergency powers.
item.dc:creator: Reuters

item.title: ✈️ US jet fuel shipments could ease European shortages amid Iran war
item.description: Aviation experts say European airlines could use US-made jet fuel to combat soaring prices and limited supply caused by the Iran war. The International Air Transport Association warned fuel shortages may emerge if the Middle East conflict continues.
item.dc:creator: BBC

item.title: 🇷🇺 Secret document reveals Russia's plans to supply advanced weapons to Iran
item.description: A classified document obtained by The Economist shows Russia offered to provide Iran with innovative weapons in large enough quantities to inflict significant casualties on American and allied forces, beyond the intelligence support Moscow is already believed to have provided.
item.dc:creator: The Economist
